hello_1.pinyin: Nǐ hǎo ya, jiāoshuǐ shíjiān dào la!

hello_2.text: 嗨！我们一起去看看花园吧！
hello_2.pinyin: Hāi! Wǒmen yìqǐ qù kànkan huāyuán ba!

hello_3.text: 太阳出来啦，我们开始吧！
hello_3.pinyin: Tàiyáng chūlái la, wǒmen kāishǐ ba!

hello_4.pinyin: Nǐ lái la! Huāyuán zài děng nǐ ne!

hello_5.pinyin: Zǎo ya, zhǔnbèi hǎo jiāoshuǐ le ma?

tryAgain_1.pinyin: Zài shì yí cì, nǐ kěyǐ de!

tryAgain_2.pinyin: Méi guānxi, zài lái yí cì ba!

tryAgain_3.pinyin: Mànmàn xiǎng, zài shì yí cì!

welcomeBack_1.pinyin: Huānyíng huílái ya, wǒ hǎo xiǎng nǐ!

welcomeBack_2.text: 你回来啦，花园一直在等你！
welcomeBack_2.pinyin: Nǐ huílái la, huāyuán yìzhí zài děng nǐ!

newSeedAnnouncement_1.text: 今天有一颗新的种子哦！
newSeedAnnouncement_1.pinyin: Jīntiān yǒu yì kē xīn de zhǒngzi ó!

newSeedAnnouncement_2.pinyin: Wǒmen lái zhòng yí ge xīn zì ba!

wateringTimeAnnouncement_2.text: 我们去给花园浇浇水吧！
wateringTimeAnnouncement_2.pinyin: Wǒmen qù gěi huāyuán jiāo jiao shuǐ ba!

sessionComplete_1.text: 今天的花园完成啦，你真棒！
sessionComplete_1.pinyin: Jīntiān de huāyuán wánchéng la, nǐ zhēn bàng!

sessionComplete_2.text: 太厉害了，花园又长大了一点！
sessionComplete_2.pinyin: Tài lìhai le, huāyuán yòu zhǎngdà le yìdiǎn!

sessionComplete_3.pinyin: Jīntiān zuò de zhēn hǎo, míngtiān jiàn!

paperPracticeInstruction.text: 拿起你的笔，跟着我写三遍吧！
paperPracticeInstruction.pinyin: Ná qǐ nǐ de bǐ, gēnzhe wǒ xiě sān biàn ba!

cardCollectionIntro.text: 这是你的卡片册，每一张都是你学会的字！
cardCollectionIntro.pinyin: Zhè shì nǐ de kǎpiàn cè, měi yì zhāng dōu shì nǐ xuéhuì de zì!

gameInstruction_G1.text: 看好啦，选一个字把词补完整！
gameInstruction_G1.pinyin: Kàn hǎo la, xuǎn yí ge zì bǎ cí bǔ wánzhěng!

gameInstruction_G2.text: 听听句子，选一个字填进去！
gameInstruction_G2.pinyin: Tīngting jùzi, xuǎn yí ge zì tián jìnqù!

gameInstruction_G3.text: 泡泡飞起来啦，找到我说的那个字，戳破它！
gameInstruction_G3.pinyin: Pàopao fēi qǐlái la, zhǎodào wǒ shuō de nàge zì, chuōpò tā!

gameInstruction_G4.text: 翻开卡片，找到一样的字和图！
gameInstruction_G4.pinyin: Fānkāi kǎpiàn, zhǎodào yíyàng de zì hé tú!

gameInstruction_G5.text: 这些字长得很像，找到我说的那一个！
gameInstruction_G5.pinyin: Zhèxiē zì zhǎng de hěn xiàng, zhǎodào wǒ shuō de nà yí ge!

gameInstruction_G6.text: 帮这个字找个好朋友，组成一个词！
gameInstruction_G6.pinyin: Bāng zhège zì zhǎo ge hǎo péngyou, zǔchéng yí ge cí!

gameInstruction_G7.text: 听听句子，把这些词排好队！
gameInstruction_G7.pinyin: Tīngting jùzi, bǎ zhèxiē cí pái hǎo duì!

gameInstruction_G8.text: 熊猫饿了，喂它正确的字吧！
gameInstruction_G8.pinyin: Xióngmāo è le, wèi tā zhèngquè de zì ba!

relearnLine.text: 再看一遍，马上就记住了！
relearnLine.pinyin: Zài kàn yí biàn, mǎshàng jiù jìzhù le!

star_3.text: 太厉害了，记得又快又牢！
star_3.pinyin: Tài lìhai le, jìde yòu kuài yòu láo!

throttleLine.pinyin: Jīntiān xiān bǎ huāyuán jiāo hǎo shuǐ.
